title: Automate Work Schedule
excerpt: Hi there, Monday recently launched Work Schedule, a super handy way of managing calendars of individual or groups. I was wondering if there is a way to automate Work Schedule through a board. The obvious use case being a…

posts.author: a.vanoppen (Gus)
posts.cookedHtml: Hi there, Monday recently launched Work Schedule, a super handy way of managing calendars of individual or groups. I was wondering if there is a way to automate Work Schedule through a board. The obvious use case being a vacation request in a dedicated board, moving to the “approved” status automates a series of events in the Work Schedule. I hope someone can help me out with this. Thanks!

posts.author: BiancaT (Bianca Taylor)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey Gus,

I am afraid this functionality isn’t currently supported natively, however you bring up a great idea! At this stage, setting that work schedule will remain a manual process as it stands today… Perhaps you can repost this in our developer community incase this is something that can be achieved through our API

posts.author: Susana (Susana)
posts.cookedHtml: I have doubts about this, as Gus says, it will be great if it could incorporate the vacation days of each member, but as per now, this only works as a team feature so it will apply to everybody else I guess. It will be great to add this feature as well! Thank you!
